title: Vardayini Mata Temple
tagline: Vardayini Mata Temple — spiritual town of Gujarat

overview.short: Vardayini Mata Temple (Gujarati: વરદાયિની માતા મંદિર; Hindi: वरदायिनी माता मंदिर) is situated at Rupal, Gandhinagar and is dedicated to Goddess Vardayini Mata.
overview.description: Vardayini Mata Temple (Gujarati: વરદાયિની માતા મંદિર; Hindi: वरदायिनी माता मंदिर) is situated at Rupal, Gandhinagar and is dedicated to Goddess Vardayini Mata.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Rupal, Gandhinagar
topPlaces.description: Rupal is a village in Gandhinagar district of Gujarat state, India. It is located 13 km towards north from District headquarters Gandhinagar.

topPlaces.name: Thol Lake
topPlaces.description: Thol Lake is an artificial lake near Thol village in Kadi in Mehsana District in the Indian state of Gujarat. A freshwater lake surrounded by marshes, it was built as an irrigation tank in 1912.

topPlaces.name: Paliad
topPlaces.description: Paliad, also spelled Paliyad, is a village located in the district of Gandhinagar, Gujarat, western India.

topPlaces.name: Mahatma Mandir
topPlaces.description: Mahatma Mandir is a convention and exhibition centre located at sector 13 C in Gandhinagar, Gujarat, India. It is inspired by the life and philosophy of Mahatma Gandhi.

items.note: Rupal is a village in Gandhinagar district of Gujarat state, India. It is located 13 km towards north from District headquarters Gandhinagar.
Thol Lake is an artificial lake near Thol village in Kadi in Mehsana District in the Indian state of Gujarat. A freshwater lake surrounded by marshes, it was built as an irrigation tank in 1912.
Paliad, also spelled Paliyad, is a village located in the district of Gandhinagar, Gujarat, western India.
Mahatma Mandir is a convention and exhibition centre located at sector 13 C in Gandhinagar, Gujarat, India. It is inspired by the life and philosophy of Mahatma Gandhi.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vardayini Mata Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vardayini Mata Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vardayini Mata Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International Airport, Ahmedabad (26 km) and the nearest railway station is Ahmedabad Junction (31 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vardayini Mata Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vardayini Mata Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vardayini Mata Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vardayini Mata Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vardayini Mata Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rupal, Gandhinagar, Thol Lake, Paliad, Mahatma Mandir.
